prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in `envoyproxy/envoy` under `source/extensions/transport_sockets/tls/` and `source/common/tls/` that contain logic for certificate verification or validation. Specifically, identify files that reference `SSL_CTX_set_verify`, `X509_verify_cert`, `setCertificateValidationContext`, or `verify_mode`. Report which files handle server certificate validation vs client certificate validation.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all C++ source files in `envoyproxy/envoy` under `source/extensions/transport_sockets/tls/` and `source/common/tls/` that contain logic for certificate verification or validation. Specifically, identify files that reference `SSL_CTX_set_verify`, `X509_verify_cert`, `setCertificateValidationContext`, or `verify_mode`.
